name: jkpark-claude-plugin
description: Personal Claude Code plugin. Skills: idea-refiner (iterative Korean Q&A that turns a vague idea into a buildable spec) and tech-blog-writer (research a topic/article and publish an image-rich, junior-friendly Korean tech blog post as HTML). Agent: korean-reviewer (proofreads generated Korean documents for unnatural phrasing). Hook: auto-suggests korean-reviewer after .md/.html/.pptx docs are written.
